---
title: "John Ruskin"
---

## John Ruskin

**Dates:** (1819-1900)

### Description

art critic, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1851-63)

### Biography

He married (1848) Euphemia Chalmers Gray (1828-1897); the marriage was annulled on grounds of non-consummation in 1854 and she married Millais in 1855.

### Letters

- Letter from Dec 30th [1866?]
- Letter from March 10th 1865
- Letter from Febry 14 [1865]
- Letter from May 26th [1854]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
